mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO block_trade (trade_date, ts_code, name, price, vol, amount, buyer, seller, buyer_name, seller_name) VALUES
(#{i.tradeDate}, #{i.tsCode}, #{i.name}, #{i.price}, #{i.vol}, #{i.amount}, #{i.buyer}, #{i.seller}, #{i.buyerName}, #{i.sellerName})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM block_trade WHERE (trade_date, ts_code, buyer, seller) IN
(#{i.tradeDate}, #{i.tsCode}, #{i.buyer}, #{i.seller})
mapper.select:
SELECT b.trade_date, b.ts_code, b.name, b.price, b.vol, b.amount, b.buyer, b.seller, b.buyer_name, b.seller_name, d.close AS close_price FROM block_trade b LEFT JOIN daily_quote d ON b.ts_code = d.ts_code AND b.trade_date = d.trade_date WHERE b.trade_date = #{tradeDate} ORDER BY
b.amount b.price b.vol b.amount
ASC DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM block_trade WHERE trade_date = #{tradeDate}

SELECT b.trade_date, b.ts_code, b.name, b.price, b.vol, b.amount, b.buyer, b.seller, b.buyer_name, b.seller_name, d.close AS close_price FROM block_trade b LEFT JOIN daily_quote d ON b.ts_code = d.ts_code AND b.trade_date = d.trade_date WHERE b.trade_date = #{tradeDate}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM block_trade WHERE trade_date >= #{startDate} AND amount > 0 AND ABS(amount - price * vol) / amount > 0.1
